plugins.name: typescript-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for Claude Code

plugins.name: second-opinion
plugins.description: Get 1-3 independent second opinions from other models to strengthen agent reasoning

plugins.name: preflight
plugins.description: Honest self-assessment that surfaces incomplete work, missing verifications, and improvement ideas before shipping

plugins.name: verify-code
plugins.description: Black-box end-to-end verification — actually runs the system and shows evidence that it works

plugins.name: verify-claims
plugins.description: Identify and verify unverified claims in Claude's own responses before presenting them as conclusions

plugins.name: pre-mortem
plugins.description: Systematically identify how a plan or design could fail before committing to it

plugins.name: design-options
plugins.description: Generate multiple strong design options with explicit tradeoff profiles, starting from the ideal
